spec_match.rationale: The support probes still cover all seven media element pseudo-classes with CSS.supports('selector(...)').

interactive.rationale: The live audio control now uses a local CC0 MP3 fixture instead of a silent data URI, but chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable for playback verification.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The live demo remains a CSS-only playing, paused, and muted indicator tied to a real audio element.

edge_cases.rationale: Selector parse failures are handled, but audio decoding and state transitions need browser validation.

references.rationale: The page includes ChromeStatus and Selectors Level 4 references.

design_system.rationale: The touched status badges now use design-system colors instead of raw white text.

openQuestions.title: Verify local audio fixture states
openQuestions.detail: Use chrome-devtools-mcp to play, pause, mute, and unmute the compatibility lab audio control and verify the CSS-only badges plus JS diagnostic line.

summary: Static repair switched the lab from a silent inline WAV to the shared local CC0 MP3 fixture and kept the selector-support diagnostic intact.
